message:
feat(math): add lgamma_r, classification internals, and glibc __fp* wrappers [bd-2vv.4]

Expand math ABI surface with reentrant and classification functions:

Reentrant lgamma:
- lgamma_r(f64) and lgammaf_r(f32) with sign output pointer
- Proper errno handling matching lgamma/lgammaf semantics

IEEE 754 classification (core):
- fpclassify/fpclassifyf: FP_NAN/FP_INFINITE/FP_ZERO/FP_SUBNORMAL/FP_NORMAL
- signbit/signbitf: sign bit extraction
- isinf/isinff: +1/−1/0 infinity detection
- isnan/isnanf: NaN detection

glibc internal ABI wrappers (10 functions):
- __fpclassify, __fpclassifyf
- __signbit, __signbitf
- __isinf, __isinff
- __isnan, __isnanf
- __finite, __finitef

All 14 new symbols added to support_matrix.json and libc.map.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
